_schema: Key NPCs. voice = gibberish audio profile (base_pitch 0.5-2.0, syllable_rate syl/sec, volume_db offset). emotion_mods multiply pitch/rate. Reputation tiers: hostile<-20, cold<0, neutral<20, warm<40, trusted>=40. DRAFT personalities pending director voice-sample approval (gate #1/#3).

npcs.name: Earl Dunphy
npcs.personality: Dry, deliberate, unimpressed. Speaks in complete paragraphs about incomplete collateral.

npcs.name: Marge Kowalski
npcs.personality: Quick, clipped, fair but sharp. Runs the contract board like a courtroom.

npcs.name: Hollis Vann
npcs.personality: Warm, slow drawl, long memory. Favors are currency and he keeps the books.

npcs.name: Dee Tran
npcs.personality: Warm, mid-register, relentlessly practical. Bad news delivered kindly.

npcs.name: Roy "Big Roy" Carver
npcs.personality: Booming salesman, friendly-predatory. Every handshake costs money.

npcs.name: Sandy Alvarez
npcs.personality: Matter-of-fact, tired, secretly keeps everyone's secrets in the scale logbook.

npcs.name: Patti Lund
npcs.personality: Bright, chatty, hub of the county rumor mill. Reputation echoes surface here first.

npcs.name: Gus Weaver
npcs.personality: Gravelly, few words, prices everything by squint. Respects wrenches, not talk.
